reason: Auto-rejected: gate reported judgment was required. Original: The paper proposes adding operator() and operator[] overloads to constant_wrapper. The cited code block is a valid code example showing the feature (subscript on constant_wrapper) in use, even though #2 is currently ill-formed and the proposal aims to make it work. This satisfies the evidence rule of showing the proposed syntax/API in use.
